name: Adidas AG
lede: Adidas runs three capability centers across two Indian cities. Gurugram and Chennai, covering distribution, gbs and gcc/gic, built over ten years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Adidas office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Adidas AG GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Adidas runs 3 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Gurugram, Chennai), covering distribution, gbs and gcc/gic. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Head of Talent Acquisition Tech | Digital | Analytics | GBS

about.description: Adidas's India footprint covers Gurugram and Chennai, spanning distribution, gbs and gcc/gic. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Sporting Goods, Outdoor Gear and Apparel, Consumer Product

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 49 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Adidas operate in India?
faq.a: Adidas operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Adidas have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Adidas's India GCC footprint spans Gurugram and Chennai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Adidas run in India?
faq.a: Adidas runs distribution, gbs and gcc/gic centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Adidas's India GCCs?
faq.a: Adidas's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Adidas's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 49 leaders at Adidas's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
